title: Paepalanthus anthemidiflorus
taxonomy: Paepalanthus anthemidiflorus is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. It belongs to the genus Paepalanthus and is commonly found in South America. This species is classified as a monocot, specifically an angiosperm, and is known to thrive in wet environments. Further classification places it as a member of the order Poales. The family Eriocaulaceae is a group of plants that are often found in aquatic environments.
